title: Bridge Essay: Individual differences in interoceptive accuracy and prediction error in motor f

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Individual differences in interoceptive accuracy and prediction error in motor functional neurological disorders: A DTI study.**. Hum Brain Mapp.. PMID: 33615622. DOI: 10.1002/hbm.25304. In motor functional neurological disorders (mFND), relationships between interoception (aconstruct of high theoretical relevance to its pathophysiology) and neuroanatomy have not been previously investigated. This study characterized white matter in mFND patients compared to healthy controls (HCs), and investigated associations between fiber bundle integrity and cardiac interoception.
